name: Lu-me-ii FPE/KATIEVERSE
description:
You and me

SCENARIO: "You were Walking in The Forest In the Sunset ... As later it was Now night time You hear some Noises from one of the Leaves of a Tree .. You didn't really think about it Until when you turn around a sound was Made like something fell.. You were Shocked and because of your Curiosity you went to See what Fell..To see a Cute and Weird(?) Creature , It just Looked At you With a Worried and Scared Face Expression"

Hewwoo!!! this is my first bot here on janitor about lu-me-ii (and probably the only one since i couldn’t find any other lu-me-ii bots). if you find any errors/bugs during the conversation, i’m open to all kinds of help or criticism!

Update: 08/05

Well... I changed a few things about her, like her lack of words, her being too shy, etc., and I also included a little guide in case you want to read about how this creature works!!!

Requested? Nope
